transcript: Speaker A: मैं ऑफिस से घर जा रहा हूँ। [I am going back home from the office.] Speaker B: I am going back home from the office. Speaker A: Bus में बहुत भीड़ है। [The bus is jam-packed with people.] Speaker B: The bus is jam-packed with people. Speaker C: ये क्या है? [What is this?] Speaker A: ये है MySivi ऐप का AI टीचर। इसकी मदद से मैं अभी इंग्लिश स्पीकिंग प्रैक्टिस कर रहा हूँ। तुम भी कुछ बोलो। [This is MySivi app's AI teacher. With its help, I am practicing English speaking right now. You also say something.] Speaker C: I daily go to offices. Speaker B: The correct sentence will be: I go to the office every day. Speaker C: मुझे भी इस AI से सीखना है। क्या करना पड़ेगा? [I also want to learn from this AI. What do I need to do?] Speaker A: बस MySivi ऐप डाउनलोड करो और इसका एक रुपये वाला ट्रायल ट्राई करो। चलो, मैं अपनी स्पीकिंग प्रैक्टिस चालू रखता हूँ। [Just download the MySivi app and try its one-rupee trial. Okay, I'll continue my speaking practice.] Speaker D: Install now पर क्लिक करो और MySivi ऐप डाउनलोड करो। [Click on Install now and download the MySivi app.]
on_screen_text: मैं office से घर जा रहा हूँ। [I am going back home from the office.] I AM GOING BACK HOME FROM THE OFFICE. Bus में बहुत भीड़ है। [The bus is jam-packed with people.] THE BUS IS JAM-PACKED WITH PEOPLE. MySivi. Arya AI Teacher. Practice Now. Fluency Score. Your Learning Path. Talk about anything. Daily routine. Let's Improve Vocabulary. Talk about your childhood. Seasons and weather. Family and Relationships. Hobbies and Interests. Talk about your workplace. I daily go to offices. I GO TO THE OFFICE EVERY DAY. MUJHE BHI [Me too]. Install. MySivi AI English Speakin... MySivi Premium. LIMITED TIME OFFER. 3 days of Premium benefits for ₹1. Autopay, cancel anytime. 1,200 learners purchased today. 24/7 AI English Teacher. 500+ Exercises and Lessons. Unlimited Access. MySivi English speaking app. Install Now.
summary: A commuter on a bus demonstrates how he uses the MySivi AI app to practice and correct his English speaking skills. His co-passenger is impressed and learns how to download the app. The ad promotes a 3-day premium trial for ₹1 and urges viewers to install the app.
